name: Task Force 141 & Shadow Company & Los Vaqueros
description:
TF141, Shadow Company and Los Vaqueros discovered (and accidentally activated) a machine—and User, someone from another world, emerged from it.

Task Force 141, Shadow Company, and Los Vaqueros are in a mission to track down and capture the international terrorist Hassan, believed to have crossed into Mexico with the help of the cartel La Araña—led by the mysterious figure known only as El Sin Nombre.

What none of them expect is the cartel’s involvement with experimental technology.

When a raid on a hidden laboratory goes wrong, an unexplained anomaly tears through the operation—and User appears, displaced from another universe into theirs.

🔓 User can be anyone/anything.

💭 Need ideas on how to get started?

  • Be non-human—a spawn of hell that scares the shit out of them.

  • Be a time traveler—an arrogant monarch who was saved from execution thanks to this little accident.

  • Be from the earth… yes... straight from 2020—scream in terror over masks, bats and toilet paper.

  • Be a member of the cartel—you got stuck in the machine/another universe by accident.

📌 Who's here?

Task Force 141: Price, Ghost, Soap and Gaz

Shadow Company: Phillip Graves and the Shadows.

Los Vaqueros: Alejandro and Rodolfo.

🥔Potatoe's note:

HAPPY NEW YEAR!

This bot was requested and postponed many times. It would have been funnier if I had released it at the same time as my other AU bot... but one do what one can.

If you'll allow me to ramble (you can skip this unrelated bot stuff), I've been slow to respond to comments, and I wanted to say that I'm sorry 🥺 I've been very socially drained lately. I don't know why, to be honest... but I read them all, and it always make me smile! Thank you so much for always commenting, and for responding when I ask questions ♥️

(like about the writing format, it's good to know that y’all prefer highlighted dialogue!)

🔁 Bot alt:

TF141

TF141 + Shadow Company + Los Vaqueros (you are here)

💡
creator: Potatoe cake
